---
title: "exo3_Github"
format: html
editor: visual
---
# ======= TD3 ========

# Question 1
Fallait faire tout le truc sur github, un commit et un push.

# Question 2
```{r}
df_velo <- read.csv("data/velo.csv", sep=";")
```

Deux boucles favorites :
```{r}
df_b_788 <- df_velo[df_velo$boucle == 788, ]
df_b_673 <- df_velo[df_velo$boucle == 673, ]
```

Deux jours favoris:
```{r}
df_d_0917 <- df_velo[df_velo$date == "2025-09-17", ]
df_d_0928 <- df_velo[df_velo$date == "2025-09-28", ]
```


# Question 3
